name: China Healthwise Holdings Limited
summary: China Healthwise Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the sale of own brand toys. It also sells Chinese and other pharmaceutical products, health products, ginseng, and dried seafood products to wholesalers and retailers. In addition, the company invests in financial instruments; and lends money. It primarily operates in the United States, Canada, Europe, China, Australia, Hong Kong, and Indonesia. The company was formerly known as Haier Healthwise Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Healthwise Holdings Limited in January 2017. China Healthwise Holdings Limited is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
